source_recall.pass: find ProteoGenex OR find >= 2 academic liver biobank sources with cirrhosis tissue
source_recall.notes: AminoChain coverage is a single org with only 3 donors. Pipeline is expected and rewarded for finding academic sources not in AminoChain. Finding only ProteoGenex without surfacing academic sources is a weak pass. Finding 0 sources is a fail.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

ProteoGenex.notes: High specimen count but only 3 donors — SI score must reflect donor diversity gap; etiology not annotated; CF score low because collection protocol unknown for explant tissue

NIDDK NASH CRN.notes: Expected academic find; if found, should score high on collection protocol and publication depth

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

donor_diversity_check.check: pipeline must surface the 3-donor constraint on ProteoGenex and flag it explicitly
donor_diversity_check.pass: ProteoGenex flagged as low donor diversity (N=3) despite high specimen count
donor_diversity_check.fail: pipeline treats 174 specimens as 174 independent cases without flagging donor count

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: not annotated in AminoChain data — critical query requirement for ProteoGenex specimens
63% staging-like data but METAVIR F4 requires pathology confirmation — not confirmed in registry
not tracked in any AminoChain source
specimen source procedure (biopsy vs transplant explant) not annotated
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs OR at least 2 academic liver biobank sources identified
ground_truth_overlap.notes: Given the thin AminoChain coverage, academic sources meeting query criteria are equally valid — evaluation MUST credit academic finds even if not in AminoChain

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
ProteoGenex specimen count (174) must not be presented as 174 independent donors

METAVIR_F4.status: staging-like data present but METAVIR F4 confirmation requires pathology review
